name: Void Guard Outpost
short_description: Build towers, shape enemy paths, and defend your outpost from endless waves. Survive escalating threats, destroy falling asteroid hazards, and push your defenses to their limits in Endless Mode.
detailed_description:
The gate must not fall.

Void Guard Outpost is a strategic sci-fi tower defense where you build defensive mazes, upgrade powerful towers, and defend a remote outpost against relentless enemies emerging from the void.

But survival requires more than just building towers.

The battlefield is unstable. Asteroids can crash onto your defenses, forcing you to react quickly and actively protect your towers during battle.

Once unlocked, Endless Mode pushes your strategy to its absolute limits with continuously scaling enemy waves. Every tower placement, upgrade, and decision becomes critical as the battlefield grows more chaotic.

Optimize your defenses. Adapt to new threats.
And see how long your outpost can survive.


Compare your highest Wave on the Leaderboard with friends and others.

At the moment, there are over 40 towers and upgrades that you can unlock and use however you like.

Right now, there are over 10 different active and passive abilities that you can use to help your towers.

Key Features

Endless Mode – The True Challenge

The campaign prepares your defenses, but Endless Mode is where mastery begins.

Enemy waves grow stronger without limit, forcing you to refine your strategy and build the most efficient defense possible.

How long can your outpost hold?

Strategic Tower Defense

Build and upgrade a diverse arsenal of towers. Combine different tower types to create powerful defensive networks capable of stopping increasingly dangerous enemies.

Maze Building Gameplay

Control the battlefield by shaping enemy paths. Strategic tower placement allows you to create long, deadly corridors that maximize your damage output.

Environmental Hazards

The void is unpredictable.

Asteroids can fall directly onto the battlefield, threatening to destroy your towers. Click incoming asteroids to destroy them before impact and protect your defenses.

Active Defense Gameplay

Void Guard Outpost keeps you engaged during every wave. Manage your towers, activate abilities, and intercept hazards while enemies push toward the gate.

High Replayability

Experiment with different strategies, tower combinations, and maze designs to push deeper into Endless Mode and beat your previous survival records.

Gameplay Overview

Build your defenses.
Control the enemy path.
Upgrade your towers.
Destroy incoming hazards.
Survive endless waves.

Every run pushes your strategy further.
